MOTION Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: M. Armon Cooper, Esq. 362-6000 for petitioners & moving parties; Nikolai Tehin, Esq. 951-8800 respondent & opposing party in pro per & Harold J. Rosenthal, Esq. 431-3472 specially appearing for respondents.
RULING: Argued and the Court confirmed arbitration award. Pltf to prepare proposed statement of decision and proposed judgment by 8-30 at 4pm; deft objections due by 9-4; Court will rule without further argument on judgment. (do/cli) (AJR/JH)
